_comment: Hygiene debt baseline — 2026-04-18. CI fails if any counter INCREASES above this value. Decrease each counter as PRs land.

debt_prs.PR-2: DONE 2026-04-18 — raw localStorage/sessionStorage migrated to safeStorage. Remaining 67 matches are all comments/strings (down from 193).
debt_prs.PR-3: DONE 2026-04-18 — error/warn console.* migrated to logger. Remaining 4 calls are: logger.ts (the wrapper itself, 2 calls) + analytics.ts / archetypeAnalytics.ts (DEV-gated diagnostic prints, 1 each).
debt_prs.PR-4: DONE 2026-04-18 — all 15 call sites moved to supabaseLoose boundary in @/integrations/supabase/loose. Remaining 2 matches are: 1 doc comment in loose.ts + 1 single `as unknown as SupabaseClient<any,'public',any>` inside loose.ts (the boundary itself).
debt_prs.PR-5: DONE 2026-04-18 — refactored 4 fixable cases (useCampaignTracking, PaywallModal, ArchetypeContext, Dashboard). Remaining 14 are legitimate intentional behaviors (mount-once analytics, manual-invalidation refresh keys, storage-proxy memos). All have explanatory WHY comments. Reducing further requires either useEffectEvent or a reactive storage abstraction — out of scope.
